idea: Weekly surge in freight logistics congestion index signals industrial sector pressure

data.source: Freight congestion index weekly data via html_table adapter

behavior: A sharp weekly increase in freight congestion often precedes supply chain bottlenecks, slowing manufacturing output.

market_impact.rationale: Industrial sector earnings rely heavily on smooth freight logistics; congestion constrains growth.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly congestion index rises more than 5% compared to prior week
trade_logic.exit: Once congestion index falls below 2% weekly change

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Freight congestion varies regularly with ongoing supply chain disruptions and seasonal factors.

idea: Daily spike in Google Trends searches for 'job quitting' signals labor market stress lifting financials

data.source: Google Trends daily search interest for 'job quitting' via google_trends adapter

behavior: Rapid increases in quitting-related searches indicate rising worker confidence or stress, often preceding wage inflation.

market_impact.rationale: Stronger labor markets tend to boost financial sector loan demand and credit quality.

trade_logic.entry: If daily search volume exceeds 10% above 20-day average
trade_logic.exit: When daily search volume falls below 5% above 20-day average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Worker sentiment fluctuations cause frequent daily search volume spikes.

idea: Weekly jump in consumer stress Google Trends for 'auto loan default' signals discretionary sector caution

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for 'auto loan default' via google_trends adapter

behavior: Rising searches for auto loan defaults reflect growing consumer financial strain, pressuring discretionary spending.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer discretionary spending weakens as auto loan stress rises.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly search interest rises more than 15% week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: Once search interest declines below 5% week-over-week change

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Consumer credit stress indicators fluctuate regularly with economic cycles.

idea: Daily spike in local building permits issuance signals real estate sector momentum

data.source: Local government building permits daily data via html_table adapter

behavior: A sudden rise in building permits signals upcoming construction activity and real estate market strength.

market_impact.rationale: Higher building permits often lead to increased real estate development and sector growth.

trade_logic.entry: If daily permits issued exceed 10% above 30-day average
trade_logic.exit: When daily permits fall below 5% above 30-day average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Daily building permit data shows regular bursts due to regulatory and seasonal effects.

idea: Weekly rise in political insider buying in healthcare stocks signals upcoming sector strength

behavior: An uptick in insider purchases suggests confidence in upcoming healthcare sector fundamentals or policy tailwinds.

market_impact.rationale: Insiders often buy before positive sector moves driven by innovation or regulation.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly insider buying volume exceeds 20% above 10-week average
trade_logic.exit: Once buying volume falls below 5% above 10-week average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Insider buying activity shows consistent weekly variation with regular buying bursts.

trade_logic.exit: When daily search volume falls below 3% above 20-day average

behavior: A material weekly decline in jobless claims indicates improving labor conditions and economic strength.

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weekly jobless claims data shows regular fluctuations tied to economic cycles.

idea: Daily surge in USGS earthquake activity magnitude > 3 near major ports signals freight logistics disruption risk

data.source: USGS earthquake daily activity near ports via earthquake_activity adapter

behavior: Increased seismic activity near ports can disrupt freight logistics flows, impacting industrial supply chains.

market_impact.rationale: Port disruptions cause delays and cost increases for industrial companies.

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seismic events near ports occur irregularly but often enough to generate recent signals.
